description: Letter from a merchant from Sunbat demonstrating his dedication to the community by relating how he had once traveled at a time of cold and rain to take care of a long overdue circumcision. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, pp. 101-102)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Sunbāṭ. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
